programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

programme.title: EK Onder 19 Mannen
programme.sub-title: Halve Finale: Oekraine Onder-19 - Duitsland Onder-19
programme.desc: Verslag van de wedstrijd Oekraïne - Duitsland, gespeeld in de halve finale op het EK onder 19 mannen 2026.

programme.title: Wes & Raf
programme.desc: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

programme.title: Ep. 17
programme.desc: S2 Ep17 - Due coppie di cuochi amatoriali dovranno trasformare per un giorno la propria casa in un vero Home Restaurant. A giudicarli Giorgio Locatelli ed Enzo Miccio.

programme.title: Lusso sfrenato ep1
programme.desc: S1 Ep1 Treni - Un viaggio tra piacere, lusso, comfort e bellezza per scoprire alberghi, case, auto, treni, yacht e jet privati dei super ricchi. Scopriamo i treni piu' lussuosi del mondo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA 24 Ep.02
programme.desc: S24 Ep2 Hell's Kitchen USA 24 Ep.02 - I nostri cuochi amatoriali devono affrontare la sfida di sgusciare e preparare il piatto perfetto a base di capesante. Successivamente, entrambe le squadre non riescono a portare a termine il servizio della cena.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA 24 Ep.03
programme.desc: S24 Ep3 Hell's Kitchen USA 24 Ep.03 - Gli chef rimasti in gara si sfidano in una prova di velocita' nella preparazione della colazione. Durante la cena, le squadre cedono sotto pressione e devono affrontare l'ira epica di Gordon.

programme.title: Na Pizza S.3 Ep.02
programme.desc: S3 Ep2 Na Pizza S.3 Ep.02 - In questa puntata Renato Bosco ospitera' Davide Sardina, allievo del celebre maestro pizzaiolo campano Salvatore Lionello.

programme.title: Ep.03
programme.desc: S3 Ep3 - In questa puntata Renato Bosco ospitera' Davide Civitiello, campione del mondo di pizza napoletana.

programme.title: Che il gioco abbia inizio
programme.desc: S1 Ep1 Che il gioco abbia inizio - Dieci sconosciuti salgono su un autobus con i finestrini oscurati. Senza sapere dove si trovano, affrontano delle sfide, ottengono indizi e cercano di individuare la Destinazione X.

programme.title: Il gioco si fa duro
programme.desc: S1 Ep2 Il gioco si fa duro - L'avventura prosegue nel nord Europa, dove non mancano certo i paesaggi e le piste. I concorrenti si rendono conto di quanto sia importante il depistaggio. L'inganno di un giocatore porta alla rovina di un altro.

programme.title: Ep. 17
programme.desc: S2 Ep17 - Due coppie di cuochi amatoriali dovranno trasformare per un giorno la propria casa in un vero Home Restaurant. A giudicarli Giorgio Locatelli ed Enzo Miccio.

programme.title: Umbria
programme.desc: S9 Ep2 Umbria - In Umbria c'e' una via dove si produce l'olio extravergine d'oliva. Luigi, Elisa, Donatella e Giorgiana si contendono il titolo di miglior ristorante lungo la Via dell'olio umbra.

programme.title: Tropea
programme.desc: S9 Ep3 Tropea - 4 Ristoranti sbarca in Calabria! Carmen, Pasquale, Anna e Pino si danno battaglia per conquistare il titolo di miglior ristorante sulla Costa degli Dei.

programme.title: Ep.04
programme.desc: S8 Ep4 - Le quattro giovani spose protagoniste di questo episodio promettono quattro scatenatissime feste tra amici a base di musica, balli, cocktail e tanta leggerezza.

programme.title: Ep.05
programme.desc: S8 Ep5 - I matrimoni di queste quattro spose si tingeranno di verde, colore dell'energia, della natura e della speranza: soprattutto quella di vincere Quattro Matrimoni!

programme.title: Ep. 18
programme.desc: S2 Ep18 - Due coppie di cuochi amatoriali dovranno trasformare per un giorno la propria casa in un vero Home Restaurant. A giudicarli Giorgio Locatelli ed Enzo Miccio.

programme.title: Carnia - Gli alberghi diffusi
programme.desc: S6 Ep8 Carnia: Gli alberghi diffusi - 4 Hotel parte alla scoperta della Carnia, patria degli alberghi diffusi: una montagna autentica e genuina, ancora poco frequentata dal turismo di massa.

programme.title: Ep.05
programme.desc: S8 Ep5 - I matrimoni di queste quattro spose si tingeranno di verde, colore dell'energia, della natura e della speranza: soprattutto quella di vincere Quattro Matrimoni!

programme.title: Costa Azzurra
programme.desc: S9 Ep6 Costa Azzurra - Chi tra Salvatore, Tina, Vincent e Francesco si aggiudichera' il titolo di miglior ristoratore di cucina italiana della Cote d'Azur, meta turistica esclusiva per eccellenza?

programme.title: Oltrepò

programme.title: Valerio e Rebecca Staffelli

programme.title: Reparto Corse F1
programme.desc: Davide Camicioli e Matteo Bobbi presentano e analizzano i week end di gara di Formula 1. I momenti principali, le parole dei protagonisti e le prospettive mondiali dei contendenti.

programme.title: Gran Bretagna
programme.desc: L'analisi del Gran Premio disputato per commentare la gara insieme agli ospiti in studio. Riviviamo i brividi della corsa attraverso le immagini piu' spettacolari e ascoltiamo i commenti a caldo dei protagonisti.

programme.title: Ep.3

programme.title: PL: Newcastle Utd v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Denied a third straight win in the Premier League for the first time since April, Eddie Howe's Newcastle attempt to bounce back from a disappointing draw here against Burnley. (06.12)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Brought some breathing rooms thanks to captain Cristian Romero's acrobatics, Thomas Frank and Spurs target all three points as Brentford arrive at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. (06.12)

programme.title: SNF: Leeds v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: Two under-pressure managers Daniel Farke, whose Leeds side stepped up midweek to beat Chelsea, and Arne Slot go at it on Saturday Night Football with Leeds hosting Liverpool. (06.12)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Beaten by Aston Villa here in a seven-goal midweek thriller, Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton go again at the Amex Stadium with the Super Sunday visit of West Ham in the Premier League. (07.12)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Fulham are back at Craven Cottage, the scene of a miraculous nine-goal classic midweek, for the visit of London rivals Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Super Sunday. (07.12)

programme.title: MNF: Wolves v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Now the owners of the joint-worst record in Premier League history after 14 games played, winless Wolves entertain Ruben Amorim's Manchester United on Monday Night Football. (08.12)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Without a Premier League win in three, Chelsea need a result against Everton at Stamford Bridge. Three points here for the Toffees would see David Moyes' side leapfrog the Blues. (13.12)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Having silenced the noise with an assured win at the San Siro midweek, Arne Slot's champions Liverpool return to Anfield for the Premier League visit of Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton. (13.12)

programme.title: SNF: Burnley v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Saturday Night Football comes from Turf Moor as Scott Parker's struggling Burnley host Fulham. The Clarets have a five-point gap to close in their fight for Premier League survival. (13.12)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Unai Emery's flying Villa, fresh from seeing off the title favourites, visit West Ham this Super Sunday. The Irons narrowly missed out on three points last weekend at Brighton. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Two useful wins in two and Spurs are back on track as Thomas Frank brings his team to the City Ground for a Premier League clash on Super Sunday against Sean Dyche's Forest. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Capitalising on the leaders' slip up last week, Manchester City go to Selhurst Park next looking to reaffirm their title credentials against a Palace side dreaming of the top four. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: After nine years, the Wear-Tyne derby makes its long-awaited Premier League return on Super Sunday as the Stadium of Light stages the 155th meeting of Sunderland and Newcastle. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: Daniel Farke's spirited Leeds arrive at the Gtech Community Stadium for a Super Sunday encounter with Keith Andrews' Brentford, who are four points better off than the visitors. (14.12)

programme.title: MNF: Man Utd v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: It's another Monday Night Football Premier League assignment for Ruben Amorim and Manchester United, who bid to take another stride forward against an out-of-form Bournemouth. (15.12)

programme.desc: A look at some of the finest strikes throughout the 2025-26 Premier League campaign.

programme.title: PL Stories: Dean Ashton
programme.desc: Spend a day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards.

programme.desc: In this memorable Premier League encounter, Manchester United welcome Everton to Old Trafford for a twisting, turning tussle that saw both sides hit the back of the net multiple times.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: Chelsea/Arsenal
programme.desc: Remember a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Chelsea and Arsenal go head-to-head in an eight-goal thriller at Stamford Bridge back in 2011.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Norwich/M'boro 2005
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Norwich City meet Middlesbrough at Carrow Road in 2005, with the Canaries making a stunning comeback.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Bolton v M'boro 2003
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Bolton Wanderers fight for their top-flight survival against Middlesbrough on the final day of the 2002-03 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Liverpool/Arsenal 2004
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Liverpool take on Arsenal back in 2004 at Anfield in a match that saw some late, late drama.

programme.desc: A look back at some of the best Premier League goals in seasons gone by. Here, take a look at the best strikes from the 2015-16 season, as Leicester stunned the world with their title win.

programme.desc: Enjoy some of the finest Premier League goals from past meetings between Manchester United and Everton.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Newcastle/Liverpool
programme.desc: Enjoy some of the best Premier League goals from past meetings between Newcastle United and Liverpool.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Coventry/Man Utd 1997
programme.desc: A look at the greatest Premier League game for each club, as voted for by fans. Here, for Coventry City, the stunning late comeback 3-2 win over Manchester United back in December 1997.

programme.title: PL Greatest:Everton/Wimbledon 1994
programme.desc: Everton: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Everton, the 3-2 win over Wimbledon in 1994 that ensured the Toffees' survival.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man City/Fulham 2008
programme.desc: Fulham: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Fulham, the 3-2 fightback at Man City in 2008 that ignited their survival run.

programme.title: PL Greatest:Newcastle/Man Utd 1996
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic game from the Premier League. Here, Newcastle United enjoy a memorable afternoon at St James' Park as they rip apart Man Utd in a 5-0 destruction.

programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Two of this season's surprise packages meet at the Stadium of Light, where Sunderland play host to Bournemouth. Both sides have 19 points after 12 Premier League games played. (29.11)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Keith Andrews and Brentford target the top half of the Premier League table with three points at home to 19th-placed Burnley, who are in the midst of a three-game losing run. (29.11)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: As Leeds pay a visit to the Etihad, hosts Manchester City look to close the gap to leaders Arsenal. A point for Pep Guardiola's City would see them temporarily climb into second. (29.11)

programme.title: SNF: Everton v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Everton bring a 10-man Old Trafford victory back to the Hill Dickinson for a Saturday Night Football contest with Newcastle, fresh from a Harvey Barnes-inspired win over City. (29.11)

programme.title: SNF: Spurs v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Without a win in three, Thomas Frank's Spurs enter a second London derby in as many weeks with Fulham's Saturday Night Football visit to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. (29.11)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: Under growing pressure, the champions Liverpool head to the capital on Super Sunday for a Premier League trip to face Nuno Espirito Santo's West Ham United at the London Stadium. (30.11)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Wolves make the short trip to Villa Park on Super Sunday as Rob Edwards searches for his first win. Aston Villa climbed into the top four last weekend with a win over Leeds United. (30.11)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Picking up from a 3-0 dismantling of the Premier League champions, Nottingham Forest entertain Fabian Hurzeler's in-form Brighton at the City Ground on Super Sunday. (30.11)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: Six points adrift from their league-leading rivals, Chelsea host Arsenal on Super Sunday. The Gunners saw a resounding win over north London neighbours Spurs last time out. (30.11)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Winless in four now, Bournemouth's search for a return to form continues with a midweek meeting against Everton. The Toffees were dismantled by a rampant Newcastle at the weekend. (02.12)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Fulham bring three wins in four to this Premier League encounter with a visiting Manchester City. Pep Guardiola's men bounced back from defeat to Newcastle, beating Leeds 3-2. (02.12)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: At odds with his own fanbase, can Thomas Frank restore harmony with the travelling Spurs faithful on Tyneside as his team take on a resurgent Newcastle at St James' Park? (02.12)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Following a draw at Stamford Bridge, the Premier League leaders Arsenal take on more London opposition in the shape of Brentford and their in-form Brazilian forward Igor Thiago. (03.12)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Two of the Premier League's form sides collide at the Amex Stadium as Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton entertain Aston Villa. The visitors eye a sixth straight win in all competitions. (03.12)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Sat 19th in the table, Scott Parker's Burnley bid to avoid a fifth consecutive Premier League loss with the visit of Crystal Palace - who come from a home defeat at the weekend. (03.12)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: Bottom-of-the-table Wolves welcome Nottingham Forest to Molineux. New Wolves boss Rob Edwards' wait for a first win goes on after a narrow defeat to Aston Villa on Sunday. (03.12)

programme.title: PL: Leeds v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Having held the league leaders to a draw with 10 men, Enzo Maresca's Chelsea look to extend a four-game unbeaten run away to a Leeds side who have conversely lost their last four. (03.12)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Back to winning ways at West Ham, including a first Premier League goal in red for Alexander Isak, champions Liverpool face a stern Anfield test against Regis Le Bris' Sunderland. (03.12)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester United return to Old Trafford to face West Ham after coming from behind to win at Palace. The Irons will be without Lucas Paquetá after his sending off against Liverpool. (04.12)

programme.title: Transfer 360: Patrick Vieira
programme.desc: Get the inside story on how an unknown French midfielder became one of Arsenal's greatest stars. Hear from Patrick Vieira himself and Arsene Wenger on how the deal happened.

programme.title: Gary Neville's Soccerbox
programme.desc: Gary Neville joins former teammate Teddy Sheringham to look back at the career of one of England's most elegant strikers. From his early days at Spurs to winning the treble at United.

programme.title: Gary Neville's Soccerbox
programme.desc: Gary Neville is joined by former French international defender William Gallas to look back on his greatest games playing for Chelsea, Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur.

programme.title: PL Retro: Man Utd v Tottenham
programme.desc: Manchester United welcome Tottenham to Old Trafford on the final day of the 1998-99 Premier League season. A win for Utd would secure them the title - and keep them on track for the treble.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '94
programme.desc: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, arch rivals Liverpool and Manchester United meet at Anfield back in 1994 in a match that saw one of the Premier League's great comebacks.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Swansea/C Palace '16
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Swansea City take on Crystal Palace at the Liberty Stadium in a high-scoring encounter in the 2016-17 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Charlton/WHU '01
programme.desc: Relive one of the Premier League's great games. Here, Charlton Athletic take on West Ham United at The Valley in November 2001 in a pulsating encounter that went down to the wire.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man City/Man Utd 2002
programme.desc: Relive one of the Premier League's great games. Here, Manchester City take on Manchester United back in 2002 in the last Manchester derby to be played at Maine Road.

programme.title: Best Premier League Goals 14/15
programme.desc: Enjoy some of the best Premier League goals from years gone by. Here, the best strikes from the 2014-15 season, a year in which Chelsea ran away with the title.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: M City v Liverpool
programme.desc: Take a look back at some of the best Premier League goals from top flight clashes between Manchester City and Liverpool.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Chelsea v Arsenal
programme.desc: Enjoy some of the finest goals from matches between London rivals Chelsea and Arsenal.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Leics/Man U '14
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Leicester City host Manchester United in an eight-goal thriller at the King Power Stadium back in 2014.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man Utd/Derby'97
programme.desc: Relive a Premier League classic. Here, Derby County visit Manchester United at Old Trafford back in 1997 on what would be one of the Rams' most memorable Premier League afternoons.

programme.title: PL Greatest: B'mouth/Liverpool '16
programme.desc: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, Bournemouth host Liverpool at the Vitality Stadium in the 2016-17 season in a game that saw the Cherries complete a thrilling comeback.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Arsenal/Spurs 2010
programme.desc: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, Arsenal take on Spurs in a memorable five-goal north London derby at the Emirates in 2010, in a game that saw a stunning comeback.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: PL: Everton v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Fourteenth meets 15th in the Premier League with Everton against Fulham. The Toffees earned a point earlier in the week, while Fulham ended a four-game losing run last Saturday. (08.11)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: With the pressure lifted on Nuno Espirito Santo, West Ham search for momentum under the Portuguese as former Hammer Scott Parker brings his Burnley side to the London Stadium. (08.11)

programme.title: SNF: Sunderland v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, Sunderland - who entered the weekend in fourth after ex-Gunner Granit Xhaka's equaliser on Monday - play league leaders Arsenal at the Stadium of Light. (08.11)

programme.title: SNF: Chelsea v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: It's winless Wolves at Stamford Bridge for Chelsea on Saturday Night Football. The visitors parted ways with manager Vitor Pereira after last weekend's 3-0 defeat in west London. (08.11)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Relinquishing unbeaten runs last weekend, Aston Villa and Bournemouth eye a return to form in this Super Sunday contest at Villa Park in the Premier League. (09.11)

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Separated by a point in the Premier League, bitter rivals Crystal Palace and Brighton meet on Super Sunday. Palace returned to winning ways here last weekend, beating Brentford 2-0. (09.11)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: Sean Dyche's next test as Forest boss comes on Super Sunday against Leeds. Forest had to settle for a point here last week in their search for a second top-flight win of the season. (09.11)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: A Super Sunday encounter at the Gtech Community Stadium where a visiting Newcastle - without a win on the road in the Premier League in seven months - take on Brentford. (09.11)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: A fixture underpinned by eight years of top-flight dominance, the Etihad sees Manchester City and Liverpool go toe to toe with an eye on the Premier League pacesetters Arsenal. (09.11)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: On the up under Keith Andrews, midtable Brentford go to the Amex Stadium trailing hosts Brighton - who settled for a point at Palace before the break - by goal difference. (22.11)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Unbeaten in their last four Premier League outings, including a draw with Arsenal, fourth-placed Sunderland head to Fulham. The hosts' rocky form continued with defeat at Everton. (22.11)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Claiming back-to-back wins before the international break, can Nuno Espirito Santo's West Ham make it three on the spin at Bournemouth to claw themselves out of the danger zone? (22.11)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: An upturn in form brought crashing down by a City drubbing, Liverpool need a response at Anfield as the Premier League champions host Sean Dyche's improving Nottingham Forest. (22.11)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Ex-Wolves man Rob Edwards takes charge at Molineux after Vitor Pereira's dismissal, with his first examination coming against Oliver Glasner's Crystal Palace in the Premier League. (22.11)

programme.title: SNF: Newcastle v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Under the St James' Park lights on Saturday Night Football, a blockbuster Premier League encounter unfolds with Pep Guardiola's Manchester City visiting a stuttering Newcastle. (22.11)

programme.title: PL: Leeds v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Super Sunday begins from Elland Road, where Daniel Farke's Leeds host an Aston Villa side boosted by a comprehensive 4-0 victory over Bournemouth prior to the international break. (23.11)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Arsenal host bitter rivals Spurs at the Emirates, as Thomas Frank enters his first North London derby on Super Sunday. The Gunners have won the team's last three contests. (23.11)

programme.title: MNF: Man Utd v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester United enter this Monday Night Football clash five Premier League games unbeaten as a returning David Moyes and Everton bid to dampen signs of progress at Old Trafford. (24.11)

programme.desc: A look back at some classic Football League play-off finals from years gone by. Here, Burnley take on Sheffield United at Wembley in the Championship play-off final in 2009.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: C'Ship 11/12
programme.desc: A look back at some classic Football League play-off finals from years gone by. Here, Blackpool take on West Ham United at Wembley in the Championship play-off final in 2012.

programme.title: SPFL 22/23: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: The quest for Glasgow supremacy starts here, as Celtic and Rangers contest the season's first Old Firm at Celtic Park. Who will land the first blow in this storied rivalry? (03.09)

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Cardiff v Wolves
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Cardiff City host Wolves at the Cardiff City Stadium in 2018 in a match that had a dramatic ending.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Derby County v Cardiff
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Cardiff City at Pride Park in the 2017-18 campaign in a match with implications in the play-off race.

programme.title: EFL Cup 22/23: Man Utd v Newcastle
programme.desc: Twenty four years in the making, Newcastle return to Wembley for a Carabao Cup final with Manchester United, as Erik ten Hag has the chance to end United's six-year trophy drought. (26.02)

programme.title: EFL Cup Best Goals: 2022/23
programme.desc: From the Abbey all the way to Wembley - this season's Carabao Cup has thrown up a host of spectacular goals. Look back at the 2022-2023 competition's finest strikes.

programme.desc: The moment to shine at Wembley has arrived for Bolton Wanderers and Plymouth Argyle, as the pair turn their attentions away from promotion to the final of the 2022-23 EFL Trophy. (02.04)

programme.desc: A look at some of the very best goals scored in Old Firm derby clashes between Celtic and Rangers over the years.

programme.desc: A look at some of the very best goals scored in Edinburgh derby clashes between rivals Hearts and Hibs over the years.

programme.desc: Celtic host Rangers at Celtic Park in the SPFL Ladbrokes Premiership. Celtic are looking to remain on track to stay unbeaten through a full league season.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds United at Pride Park in a Championship match that saw five goals.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, West Brom take on Leeds United at The Hawthorns in a high-scoring Championship match that saw one side dominate.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the SPFL Premiership. Here, Livingston host Steven Gerrard's Rangers at the Tony Macaroni Arena in a tight game with a memorable outcome.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Birmingham City at Villa Park in a high-scoring Second City derby.

programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, the second leg of Blackpool's play-off semi-final against Nottingham Forest during the 2009-10 season.

programme.desc: Celtic and Rangers see out 2019 against one another at Celtic Park as they meet in the SPFL Premiership. Celtic were victorious in the first league meeting of the sides earlier this season.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds United at Pride Park in a Championship match that saw five goals.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, West Brom take on Leeds United at The Hawthorns in a high-scoring Championship match that saw one side dominate.

programme.desc: A look back at some famous matches from yesteryear. Here, Manchester City meet Sunderland in the final of the Capital One Cup at Wembley Stadium in 2014.

programme.desc: Edinburgh rivals Hibs and Hearts face off in the Scottish Premiership at Easter Road. With both sides in form, who will pick up three points in their battle for a European place? (02.03)

programme.title: SPFL 25/26: Hibernian v Hearts
programme.desc: Derek McInnes' surprise leaders Hearts go to Easter Road for an Edinburgh derby with Hibs. With favourable fixtures to come, a win for Hearts would reaffirm their title credentials. (27.12)

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Nottingham Forest at Villa Park in an enthralling, end-to-end encounter that saw 10 goals.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Championship. Here the play-off final from the 2011-12 campaign, as Blackpool and West Ham meet at Wembley.

programme.title: 150 Years of the Edinburgh Derby
programme.desc: To mark the 150th anniversary of one of the oldest rivalries in world football, look back at the origins, key moments with club legends and the tumultuous takeover bid in 1990.

programme.title: SPFL 20/21: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: Glasgow rivals Celtic and Rangers collide at Celtic Park in a big clash from the Scottish Premiership. The sides come into this separated by a single point at the top.

programme.title: EFL 18/19:Leeds Utd v Derby County
programme.desc: Frank Lampard's Derby go to Elland Road for the second leg of their 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final with Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds, with the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster
programme.desc: Two matches of Sky Bet League 1 semi-final play-off action couldn't separate Charlton Athletic and Doncaster Rovers in 2019, as a date at Wembley hinged on a dramatic penalty shootout.

programme.title: EFL Cup 14/15: Chelsea v Spurs
programme.desc: A look back at some famous matches from yesteryear. Here, Chelsea face Tottenham Hotspur in the final of the Capital One Cup at Wembley Stadium in 2015.

programme.title: SPFL 22/23: Dundee Utd v Dundee
programme.desc: The Dundee derby arrives as Dundee United meet Dundee at Tannadice Park in the cinch Premiership. The visitors are still looking for their first league win here.

programme.title: SPFL 24/25: Dundee Utd v Dundee
programme.desc: On the opening weekend of the Scottish Premiership season, a Dundee derby unfolds as Jim Goodwin's Tangerines mark their top flight return by hosting neighbours Dundee at Tannadice. (04.08)

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
programme.desc: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
programme.desc: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

programme.desc: A look back at some classic Football League play-off finals from years gone by. Here, Derby County take on West Bromwich Albion at Wembley in the Championship play-off final in 2007.

programme.title: SPFL 21/22: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: With one hand on the Scottish Premiership crown, Celtic welcome Rangers to Celtic Park for the last Old Firm of the season. Will Ange Postecoglou guide his men to triumph?

programme.desc: The concluding day of the Chevron Championship at Memorial Park. Taking a five-shot lead into the final round, Nelly Korda attempts to keep former champion Patty Tavatanakit at bay. (26.04)

programme.title: US Women's Open Golf R4 Hlts
programme.desc: The final day of the US Women's Open at the Riviera Country Club. Taking a share of the lead yesterday, Nelly Korda is primed to clinch a second straight Major title. (07.06)

programme.title: Women's PGA Championship Hlts
programme.desc: The final day at the 2026 KPMG Women's PGA Championship, won previously by Minjee Lee. Hazeltine National Golf Club is the venue for the third women's Major of the year. (28.06)

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2026 Hulencourt Women's Open, a Ladies European Tour event taking place in Belgium.

programme.title: Evian Championship '25 Final Round
programme.desc: Day four of the Amundi Evian Championship, Europe's only women's Major, in Evian-les-Bains, France. England's Cara Gainer and Australia's Gabriela Ruffels lead heading into the final day.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the John Deere Classic, taking place at the TPC Deere Run in Illinois. Brian Campbell overcame Emiliano Grillo in a playoff for last year's win. (05.07)

programme.title: PGA Tour: The Cut
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the PGA Tour. Follow the world's best players as they prepare for the big events in 2026.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Le Vaudreuil Golf Challenge during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: US Senior Open Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2026 edition of the US Senior Open Championship at Scioto Country Club in Columbus, Ohio. Padraig Harrington took the spoils a year ago.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the John Deere Classic, taking place at the TPC Deere Run in Illinois. Brian Campbell overcame Emiliano Grillo in a playoff for last year's win. (05.07)
